metadata.description: Claude Code marketplace hosting the SEO Content-Gap analyzer plugin.

plugins.name: seo-content-gap
plugins.description: Point it at one of your pages + competitor pages (or let it web-search competitors). It crawls each page, aligns them block-to-block and FAQ-to-FAQ, clusters topics, checks search ranking, and produces a gap report (HTML/PDF + XLSX) plus a conversational session. It identifies what each competitor wrote, how they differ, content quality, internal-linking gaps, and what you should write — it does NOT generate the final copy.
